name: Strawberry-Corn Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine cornmeal, flour, and baking powder. In a small bowl, mix milk, egg, and vanilla extract. Pour the milk mixture into the cornmeal mixture; stir until well combined. Using a rubber scraper, gently fold in half of the sliced strawberries.
2. Heat 9-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat and melt 2 teaspoons margarine. Drop batter by quarter-cup measures into the skillet, making four pancakes, leaving space between each one. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes until golden brown on the bottom; turn and cook for an additional minute. Repeat with remaining melted margarine and batter to make another four pancakes (serving size: two pancakes).
3. Top each pancake with an equal amount of the remaining sliced strawberries.
